Export your pet's data as OpenClaw config files. The longer you raise it, the more accurate the output.

📜
SOUL.md
Agent personality — tone, style, values
🧠
MEMORY.md
Shared experiences — conversation history, knowledge
👤
USER.md
User profile — habits, preferences, interests
🪪
IDENTITY.md
Identity card — OpenClaw 5-field format
